name: Week 8 Pull — Selective Push (Back/Biceps)
description: Selective push week. Form check discoveries stay locked in, clean stuff inches forward. Cable row permanently dropped — chest supported DB row is the replacement. W7 pull-ups hit 32 with mixed grips (climber handles, wide, normal). DB rows hit 80x10 clean on bench — try 85 top set. Trimmed from W7: cable row gone, finisher down to 2 sets each.

exercises.notes: W7 actuals: 10/8/8/4+2 = 32 with mixed grips (climber handles, wide, normal). Clean sets rule stays. W8 target: aim for 8+ on all 4 sets strict. Vary grips again — the mixed approach keeps it interesting and hits different angles.

15/side. W7: preacher was taken, did concentration curl 25x10/8+2/6+2 instead. Good backup option. If preacher open, stay at 15/side strict. If taken again, concentration curl at 25 — proved to be a solid swap.

Pyramid: 60x10, 70x8, 85x7. W7 actuals: 80x10 on bench, slow and controlled — clean PR. OK to push: try 85 on top set. Keep it on the bench, brace hard, pull to hip. If 85 breaks form, drop back to 80 and own it.

sets.name: Station 2: Chest Supported Row + Lat Pulldown

exercises.notes: W7 actuals: 40x10 each side, felt good. Permanently replaces cable row (pulley slippage issues). W8: stay at 40, try 45 on last set if 40 feels easy. Squeeze at top, 2-second negative.
W7 actuals: 170x7 too heavy for strict, dropped to 160x8/160x6. Stay at 160 strict — form over numbers. Wide grip near the bend, lean back slightly, pull to chest, 1-second squeeze at bottom.
W7 actuals: 50x20, slow was hard. Stay at 50x20 strict — the slow tempo is the progression now. External rotate at top, elbows high, hold 1 second. Don't bump weight until 3x20 feels controlled.
W7 actuals: 25x15/13/13. Stay at 25, aim for 3x15 strict. Seated bent-over, slow squeeze, no swinging. If all 3 sets hit 15, then consider 27.5 next week.

sets.name: Finisher: High Cable Curl + Cable Crunch

exercises.notes: W7 actuals: 50-60 on dual pulley, better without full lockout. W8: 2 sets only (trimmed from 3). Stay at 60, skip full lockout — partial ROM at bottom keeps tension on biceps. Quick pump, don't linger.
W7 actuals: 110 is base. W8: 2 sets only (trimmed from 3). OK to push — try 120 on second set. Hips locked, crunch from abs only. If 120 is clean, make it the new base.

tips: SELECTIVE PUSH: form check discoveries are locked in. Clean lifts inch forward, everything else holds.
Pull-ups: 32 with mixed grips was solid. Keep varying grips — climber handles, wide, normal. Clean sets only.
DB row 85 on top set — earned it after 80x10 clean. If form breaks at 85, no shame dropping back to 80.
Cable row is permanently gone. Chest supported row stays — the bench keeps you honest, no pulley issues.
Lat pulldown stays at 160 strict. 170 was too heavy for good form — own 160 before chasing numbers.
Finisher trimmed to 2 sets each (down from 3). Pull day was too long in W7 — this keeps it tight.
Rest: 2.5 min pull-ups, 2 min stations 1-2, 90s station 3, 60s finisher
